MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOSEPH SACRAMENTO FOR PLAINTIFF DON DEFRAGA
DEFENDANT TRAVIS J KAPPERS IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 331 OCTAVIA STREET #1 WITH A STAY OF EXECUTION TO 1/10/05. IF DEFENDANT PAYS $950 BY MONEY ORDER TO PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY BY NOON ON 12/31/04 THE MOVE OUT DATE WILL BE EXTENDED TO 2/10/05.
IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENT DUE, SET ASIDE JUDGEMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL. THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF CANNOT STORE ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY AND MUST LEAVE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. PLAINTIFF WILL RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND LAST MONTHS RENT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES.

JUDGE PRO TEM:DAVID ELIGATOR; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORER:BELDON YEE (218)
